articles.title: At LIV Golf Virginia, the Show Goes On ... for Now - Sports Illustrated
articles.description: Bryson DeChambeau and his fellow LIV golfers kicked off their event with music blaring, writes Bob Harig, but the happy scene on the ground wasn’t enough to mask the uncertainty ahead.
articles.content:
STERLING, Va. The show goes on. 
But for how many weeks? Months? Next year? Those are questions that will be debated and debunked and ultimately decided, over a time to be determined.
But for now, … [+6913 chars]
